background: Air samples were collected on eight successive days at two different sites. Particulate matter was measured in these samples as an index of environmental quality.

task.query: Calculate the mean particulate matter for both sites.
task.answer: To the nearest unit, both sites have means of 36 μg/m³.

task.query: Analyze the variability of readings at both sites using stemplots.
task.answer: Side-by-side stemplots reveal different pictures, with much greater variability of readings at site 1.

task.query: Identify any particular readings that stand out at site 1.
task.answer: One particular reading at site 1 was very high (68 μg/m³), indicating a very high variability.
